% GENERATED by scripts/render_live.py — do not edit by hand.
Of the 104 group-stage fixtures, 43 results are now fixed; Track~A conditions on these outcomes and draws over the remaining 61 matches with June~10 ratings frozen.

Track~A conditions on results alone. Track~B replaces the June~10 ratings with live ClubElo estimates after each match, incorporates bookmaker H2H odds for unplayed fixtures as pre-match inputs, and adjusts for confirmed lineup changes at T$-$90~min. Both tracks use $N$~=~50{,}000 draws from the same Poisson simulator.
